is a village in [Notodden Municipality](/wiki/Notodden_Municipality "Notodden Municipality") in [Telemark](/wiki/Telemark "Telemark") county, [Norway](/wiki/Norway "Norway"). The village is located along the river [Tinnelva](/wiki/Tinnelva "Tinnelva"), about 4 kilometres (2.5 mi) to the south of the village of [Tinnoset](/wiki/Tinnoset "Tinnoset") and the lake [Tinnsjå](/wiki/Tinnsj%C3%A5 "Tinnsjå"). It sits about 17 kilometres (11 mi) to the southwest of the village of [Bolkesjø](/wiki/Bolkesj%C3%B8 "Bolkesjø"), about 22 kilometres (14 mi) to the northwest of the [town of Notodden](/wiki/Notodden_(town) "Notodden (town)"), about 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) to the northwest of the village of [Heddal](/wiki/Heddal_(village) "Heddal (village)"), and about 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) to the northeast of the village of [Sauland](/wiki/Sauland "Sauland") (in [Hjartdal Municipality](/wiki/Hjartdal_Municipality "Hjartdal Municipality")). [Gransherad Church](/wiki/Gransherad_Church "Gransherad Church") is located in the village.[[2]](#cite_note-snl-2)

**Gransherad** is a village in [Notodden Municipality](/wiki/Notodden_Municipality "Notodden Municipality") in [Telemark](/wiki/Telemark "Telemark") county, [Norway](/wiki/Norway "Norway"). The village is located along the river [Tinnelva](/wiki/Tinnelva "Tinnelva"), about 4 kilometres (2.5 mi) to the south of the village of [Tinnoset](/wiki/Tinnoset "Tinnoset") and the lake [Tinnsjå](/wiki/Tinnsj%C3%A5 "Tinnsjå"). It sits about 17 kilometres (11 mi) to the southwest of the village of [Bolkesjø](/wiki/Bolkesj%C3%B8 "Bolkesjø"), about 22 kilometres (14 mi) to the northwest of the [town of Notodden](/wiki/Notodden_(town) "Notodden (town)"), about 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) to the northwest of the village of [Heddal](/wiki/Heddal_(village) "Heddal (village)"), and about 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) to the northeast of the village of [Sauland](/wiki/Sauland "Sauland") (in [Hjartdal Municipality](/wiki/Hjartdal_Municipality "Hjartdal Municipality")). [Gransherad Church](/wiki/Gransherad_Church "Gransherad Church") is located in the village.[[2]](#cite_note-snl-2)

Historically, this village was the [administrative centre](/wiki/Administrative_centre "Administrative centre") of the old [Gransherad Municipality](/wiki/Gransherad "Gransherad") which existed from 1860 until 1964. Prior to 1860, the village and surrounding areas were part of [Hjartdal](/wiki/Hjartdal "Hjartdal").[[2]](#cite_note-snl-2)
